initiatives.name: CLT Marxists
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support in Charlotte. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective care and political education.

initiatives.name: SEAC Village
initiatives.description: Southeast Asian community organization building mutual aid networks and cultural solidarity through community care, education, and support initiatives in Charlotte.

initiatives.name: Feed the Movement Charlotte
initiatives.description: Local mutual aid initiative providing food and resources to community members in need.

initiatives.name: Charlotte Uprising
initiatives.description: A collective of folks from Charlotte, NC fighting for a world without police and prisons.

initiatives.description: Kicking Ass For The Working Class

initiatives.description: A community-led coalition in Charlotte, NC, advocating for residents facing displacement, homelessness, & unsafe living conditions.
